## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on AI-generated content creation and optimization for Arena's website.](https://fathom.video/share/RFzexAM_jSFm6MRJVzeAiPxR-h4L93yy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is ramping up content production, aiming for 5 articles this week and 10 next week](https://fathom.video/share/RFzexAM_jSFm6MRJVzeAiPxR-h4L93yy?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Initial focus is on bottom-of-funnel content optimized for Arena's products/features](https://fathom.video/share/RFzexAM_jSFm6MRJVzeAiPxR-h4L93yy?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Quality bar is set at 70-75% initially to prioritize speed, with plans to further refine top articles later](https://fathom.video/share/RFzexAM_jSFm6MRJVzeAiPxR-h4L93yy?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Arena team to review 5 draft articles this week and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/RFzexAM_jSFm6MRJVzeAiPxR-h4L93yy?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Walkthrough of Airtable content planning/tracking tool to be scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/RFzexAM_jSFm6MRJVzeAiPxR-h4L93yy?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Ramp-up

  - [5 articles being delivered this week, 10 next week](https://fathom.video/share/RFzexAM_jSFm6MRJVzeAiPxR-h4L93yy?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Using calibration articles to get CTAs, product info, brand voice right](https://fathom.video/share/RFzexAM_jSFm6MRJVzeAiPxR-h4L93yy?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Public/refined versions come 2-4 months later based on performance data](https://fathom.video/share/RFzexAM_jSFm6MRJVzeAiPxR-h4L93yy?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [Aiming for 70-75% quality initially to prioritize speed over perfection](https://fathom.video/share/RFzexAM_jSFm6MRJVzeAiPxR-h4L93yy?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

### Data-Driven Optimization

  - [Extensive data collected on content performance (clicks, rankings, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/RFzexAM_jSFm6MRJVzeAiPxR-h4L93yy?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Top performing clusters prioritized for further enhancements](https://fathom.video/share/RFzexAM_jSFm6MRJVzeAiPxR-h4L93yy?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Old articles to be updated based on learnings of what performs best](https://fathom.video/share/RFzexAM_jSFm6MRJVzeAiPxR-h4L93yy?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)

### Collaboration & Feedback

  - [Arena team to review draft articles and provide feedback this week](https://fathom.video/share/RFzexAM_jSFm6MRJVzeAiPxR-h4L93yy?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Prioritize feedback on most important areas to improve flow](https://fathom.video/share/RFzexAM_jSFm6MRJVzeAiPxR-h4L93yy?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Walkthrough of Airtable planned to align on process/tracking](https://fathom.video/share/RFzexAM_jSFm6MRJVzeAiPxR-h4L93yy?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

## Next Steps
